projects.description: Nornicdb is a distributed low-latency, Graph+Vector, Temporal MVCC with all sub-ms HNSW search, graph traversal, and writes. Then, adding intelligent features like schemas, managed embeddings, LLM reranking+inferrence, GPU accel, Auto-TLP, Memory Decay, and MCP server.
